BagM Beih. 02, 131 [contract concerning a waste field?][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
1'1'

[...] x ina UGU ⸢KI?⸣ x [...]

[...] ... concerning ... [...]

2'2'

[...] ḪU A ša₂ mna-ṣi-[ir? ...]

[...] ... son of Naṣir [...]

3'3'

[...] x-a-na u MU.AN.NA-⸢MEŠ⸣ [...]

[...] ... and the years [...]

4'4'

[...] x SUM? E₂ E₂ d60 x [...]

[...] ... Anu [...]

5'5'

[...]⸢u₂⸣-tu itiNE U₄ x [...]

[...] ... the month Abu, the day [...]

6'6'

[...] x x x (x) [...]

[...] (traces) [...]
